models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    balance = Column(Decimal)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'), nullable=False)
    amount_total = Column(Decimal)
    notes = Column(String)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
    amount = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Product

rules.name: Check Credit Rule 1
rules.description: Ensure Customer balance is less than credit limit.
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit, error_msg='Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})')

rules.name: Check Credit Rule 2
rules.description: Calculate Customer balance as sum of all unpaid Orders.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Check Credit Rule 3
rules.description: Order amount_total is derived from the sum of its Items amounts.

rules.name: Check Credit Rule 4
rules.description: Calculate Item amount as the product of quantity and unit price.

rules.name: Check Credit Rule 5
rules.description: Copy unit price for Item from corresponding Product's unit price.

rules.name: App Integration Rule
rules.description: Send Order to Kafka if date shipped is not null.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={'topic': 'order_shipping'})
